descriptionTemplate: Castor gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Castor's DMG always critically hits; after playing {Onyx Plume}, inflict [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Corrosion} on the target. Gain +50% Shield from keeping {Onyx Plume} cards in hand at turn ends.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Castor gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Castor's DMG always critically hits; after playing {Onyx Plume}, inflict [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Corrosion} on the target. Gain +50% Shield from keeping {Onyx Plume} cards in hand at turn ends. The first time {Onyx Plume} is played each turn, inflict {Corrosion} equal to Talent {Cleansing Feathers} on all enemies, and the HP lost when {Corrosion} is removed increases from 300% to 500%.
